heading: References
label: 9924 References
text: Any reference in any provision of law to the poverty line set forth in section 624 or 625 of the Economic Opportunity Act of 1964 shall be construed to be a reference to the poverty line defined in . Except as otherwise provided, any reference in any provision of law to any community action agency designated under title II of the Economic Opportunity Act of 1964 shall be construed to be a reference to an entity eligible to receive funds under the community services block grant program.section 9902 of this title
notes: References in TextThe Economic Opportunity Act of 1964, referred to in text, is , , . Title II of the Act was classified generally to subchapter II (§ 2781 et seq.) of chapter 34 of this title prior to repeal by , , . Section 625 of the Act, which was subsequently renumbered section 624 of the Act and related to the poverty line, was classified to , prior to repeal by . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 88–45278 Stat. 508Pub. L. 97–35, title VI, § 683(a)95 Stat. 519section 2971d of this titlesection 683(a) of Pub.
